text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the sporting goods store to do some
shopping and spot two Tracen students browsing
the shelves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of them is Little Cocon. Always cool with an
air of cynicism about her, she has a bit of a sharp
tongue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other is Bitter Glasse, a highly competitive
runner who boasts supernatural strength and
delights in harsh training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both are under the tutelage of my colleague
Trainer Kashimoto. I never considered either of
them to be the sociable type, though...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Trainer
<username>! What a
coincidence!
choice_data_list:
It's rare to see you two together on your days
off.

It's rare to see you two together on your days
off.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
...That's none of your business. And we're not
playing buddy-buddy anyhow.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Take it easy, Little Cocon...
We came here today to exchange info.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon coldly turns away as Bitter Glasse
explains the situation to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're sharing opinions on the equipment
they've been using in order to suggest better
options to Trainer Kashimoto.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
We do trust Trainer Kashimoto, of course. She
would never pick out anything inadequate.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
But she's constantly looking at reviews of shoes,
fitness wear, and stuff for our sakes.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
So we figured it'd be nice if we could make things
a little easier for her. Our third year is getting
closer, after all!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Yep. Our third year in the Twinkle Series, though
I'm sure you're well aware of that.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
The last of the three most important years in an
Umamusume's career.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
We gotta get our heads in the game. Oh yeah, I'm
getting fired up!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
What about you? Do you really have time to be
idling around here?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If you slack off too much, you're going to slip up. That goes for you and your partner.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: We'll be leaving now.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Haha, well, that's that! Say hi to
<chrname> for us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While mulling over what they both said, I decide
to head back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's late, and the only student still training is
Happy Meek, the trainee of my colleague Trainer
Kiryuin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Happy Meek never says much, and her blank
expression makes it look like she's always zoning
out, but her bond with Trainer Kiryuin runs deep.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Trainer <username>.
Evening.
choice_data_list: Trainer Kiryuin isn't here with you?
Trainer Kiryuin isn't here with you?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: She's... holed up? In her office. Very busy.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
I'm on break in the meantime... But I couldn't just
stand around doing nothing.
choice_data_list: And that's why you're training this late?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Well... my trainer's "holed up" in her office...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
She's working hard to refine my third-year
training regimen...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
I have to do my best, too... We're partners, after
all...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Also... your partner was working hard too...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: I'm off for another lap... Woo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something about what Happy Meek said weighs
on my mind, so I head to my office.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Also... your partner was working hard too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Could <chrname> also be trying to
think up a plan for her third year?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In my office, I find...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend some time together discussing a variety
of topics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tonight's events have helped me realize the
strength of my bond with <chrname>!
